title: Spring Family Ride Window Expanded
summary: Saturday rides now run until 4:30 PM during spring programming weeks.

title: Volunteer Engineer Orientation
summary: New volunteer orientation includes dispatch basics, safety checks, and guest operations.

title: Group Booking Support Added
summary: School and community groups can request planning support through the online form.

title: Track Maintenance Complete
summary: Routine maintenance improved ride smoothness and reduced dwell time at turnaround point.
